headline: Honeywell Aerospace: A Promising Venture, But I Need More Information
summary: Honeywell Aerospace Inc. spinoff update: Q1 sales +4%, 26.5% margin, $19B backlog, and 22x forward P/E. Click here for more on HONA stock as it begins trading.
